entities.name: 24-hour time format
entities.context: V's preferred system-wide time display format, also called military time

entities.name: Timezone specification
entities.context: Requirement to always include timezone (ET, PT, UTC) with time references

entities.name: Temporal ambiguity avoidance
entities.context: Preference to avoid vague time references like 'tomorrow' or 'next week' without specific dates

relationships.context: Both are components of V's time formatting standards
Both serve the goal of precise, unambiguous time communication
